content.en:
"Pillar of Tracelessness, just choose it!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Pillar of Absence can create a special small realm, and is one of the common treasures used by many forces to study primordial artifacts.

It's just that the small realm created by the Lord of Traceless can't withstand too much power, so the grade is very low, but it is enough for Ye Tian.

Although the Pillar of Tracelessness is very expensive, it is also within Ye Tian's affordability, and it only takes 15,000 points to redeem it.

As a result, Ye Tian quickly exchanged for a Traceless Pillar.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian brought the Pillar of Tracelessness back to the Primeval Origin Boundary, preparing to place it at the Primeval Origin Boundary and then create a special small realm.

......

Archean Plains boundary.

After Ye Tian sent the Pillar of Tracelessness back, he began to integrate a large amount of resources into the Pillar of Tracelessness, providing it with energy, and then creating a small realm.

And maintaining the Pillar of Tracelessness also requires a lot of resources, but with Ye Tian's financial resources, it can support it.

Airplanes!!!

A special small world was opened up by Ye Tian, this small world was completely shielded from the perception of the outside world, similar to the effect of the Nine Realms, but it was far inferior in terms of grade and area.

The small realm opened up by the Pillar of Tracelessness was only the size of a large world, which could be said to be too small, and not even as large as a primordial antiquity like the Holy Dao Monument.

However, it is enough!

Ye Tian was in this small realm, preparing to copy one of the primordial artifacts in the Nine Realms, but he didn't feel the great horror at this time.

Obviously, there is finally no danger in this copy!

"Copy!"

Ye Tian began.

Soon, an Primordial Artifact was copied by Ye Tian, which was exactly the same as the Primordial Artifact in the Nine Realms, and its life level was comparable to 9.9.

"This is the 9.9 life level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He felt the extraordinariness of this body, and he also learned more about life level 9.9!

Naturally, there is a complete difference between contemplating the body of such a primordial antiquity and using the body of such a primordial antiquity to perceive the breath of life.

Before, Ye Tian had not had any understanding for a long time, but after copying this primordial antiquity at this moment, he quickly had a little understanding.

In the following years, Ye Tian used this primordial antiquity body as the foundation, constantly trying to comprehend the creation technique.

However, even so, it was not so easy for him to create the technique he needed quickly.

After that, Ye Tian copied the bodies of other primordial antiquities one by one, and the bodies of each primordial antiquities were presented one by one, and then used these bodies to comprehend.

In this way, Ye Tian's perception of the 9.9 life level became deeper and deeper, and he was tested again and again.

Anyway, he didn't care about replicating the damage of the body, so a special technique gradually took shape, and although there were still some flaws at the moment, it only needed to be perfected step by step before it could be truly created.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

This amount of time was nothing for a half-step sevenfold ancestor, but for Ye Tian, it was a huge transformation.

At this moment, he had truly created a technique that allowed him to raise himself to the 9.9 life level, and it was so perfect that it could no longer be perfected.

He didn't know what the other techniques that had reached the 9.9 life level of the Half-Step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor looked like, maybe the other techniques created by the Half-Step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor were flawed, or they might affect a little foundation.

However, the technique he created will not have any drawbacks, and it is a truly perfect technique!

He named the art the Light of Life!

The light of life can raise Ye Tian's life level to 9.9, but it also requires a large number of life treasures.

For example, treasures such as the Primordial Ancient Bead can be used, anyway, with his wealth, he can naturally gather enough life treasures.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian asked his servant Qingxuan Dao Ancestor to collect more Primordial Ancient Beads, and high-quality Primordial Ancient Beads were also required.

Not only that, but he himself also exchanged his points for more life treasures in the Nine-Story Building.

He doesn't know how many life treasures there are, so naturally the more the better!

After a period of time, Ye Tian had already collected a large number of life treasures, and he felt that he was almost there, and he could hit the life level of 9.9, and he felt that he should be able to break through this time.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor, are you leaving the Nine Realms now?"

Xuanqin Dao Ancestor and other half-step sevenfold ancestors were shocked.

Not long after Ye Tiancai came in, he was about to leave?

Could it be that you feel like there is no hope and give up?

But at this point, they are only the last step away from the life level of 9.9, how can they give up so easily!

Those half-step sevenfold ancestors who had cultivated here and comprehended tens of trillions, hundreds of billions, and tens of trillions of more than one trillion did not choose to give up, Ye Tian just gave up?

They don't understand!

"I've created a technique, and I'm ready to go out and break through!"

Ye Tian confessed.

Suddenly, these half-step sevenfold ancestors looked at each other one by one, a little incredulous, thinking that Ye Tian was bragging or deliberately making excuses.

Subsequently, Ye Tian still left, as for whether they believed it or not, he didn't care.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

After Ye Tian came back, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor came to see Ye Tian.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you came out of the Nine-Fold Building so quickly?" The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor felt that Ye Tian had completely wasted this opportunity, once he came out of the Nine-Fold Building, there was no way to enter it again!

Not to mention anything else, even if the resource subsidy given by the Nine-Fold Building is very high, even if there is no hope of breakthrough at the moment, you have to stay in the Nine-Fold Realm to continue to practice and attain enlightenment!

Ye Tian said truthfully: "Landlord, I have already created a technique, and I am about to raise my life level to 9.9, so it is a waste of time to continue to stay in the Nine Realms!"

"You...... Did you really create a technique that would allow you to raise yourself to 9.9 life?"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was dumbfounded, a little incredulous.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "If the landlord doesn't believe it, I'll know if it's true or false when I come out of retreat!"

"Okay!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor didn't bother Ye Tian to break through.

Subsequently, Ye Tian retreated and practiced with peace of mind.

......

Airplanes!!!!

The dense Primordial Ancient Beads and countless life treasures were all placed around, just to raise Ye Tian's life level to level 9.9.

Then, Ye Tian began to perform the technique of the light of life.

In an instant, countless primordial ancient beads and other treasures were absorbed by the light of life.

In the next moment, endless life energy poured into Ye Tian's body, rapidly raising his life level.

If it was in the past, no matter how much life energy was absorbed, it would not be able to raise the level of life.

But under the effect of the light of life, as if there were no shackles, his life level increased rapidly.

After a long time, Ye Tian felt that his life level had reached the limit of 9.8, and he had already touched the bottleneck of 9.9 life level.

Then, he began to gather a massive number of life levels to impact this bottleneck.

After spending countless treasures, this bottleneck in the dark finally couldn't stop the light of life.

Rumble!!!!!

The bottleneck was broken, and Ye Tian's body instantly devoured the endless life level, and the life level was officially broken.
